title: rhytidostemma viride
intro: Rhytidostemma viride, also known as the "green rhytidostemma," is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhytidostemma viride include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
